temporal_description: The audio opens with a tense and suspenseful electronic score, creating a feeling of high-stakes drama and imminent danger. A close-up shot focuses on a person's hand holding a black smartphone. The phone's screen is illuminated, displaying a message in Chinese characters. The text includes phrases like "有內鬼終止交易" and "確認". In the dimly lit background, a man with graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket, is visible but out of focus. The overall lighting is dark and has a greenish tint. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The camera pulls back slightly to a medium shot of the man in the suit jacket. He has a concerned and serious expression as he looks down, seemingly at the phone he was just holding. Other people are seated around him in the dark, out-of-focus background. The greenish, moody lighting continues to dominate the scene. The man in the suit jacket brings the phone to his ear, his expression becoming more intense and focused. The camera remains steady, keeping him as the central figure. The "风行网" watermark is still present. The music is layered with a series of sharp, electronic beeps and a high-pitched, piercing tone, mimicking the sound of a digital notification or an urgent alert. The scene cuts to a different group of men in a dark, confined space. They are all holding up their smartphones, their screens glowing in the darkness. They appear to be looking at the same thing, their faces showing concentration and anticipation. The walls behind them are rough and have some faded, dark characters painted on them. The "风行网" watermark is visible in the upper left. The camera zooms in for a tight close-up on the face of one of the men from the previous shot. He is holding a phone to his ear, his face illuminated by the phone's light. He has a worried and slightly pained expression as he listens. The background is completely dark, isolating him in the frame. The "风行网" watermark remains in the corner. The combination of the ominous music and the distinct, modern-sounding alert tones builds a palpable sense of anticipation and crisis.
